description: You are automating a satellite contact for a tumbling spacecraft. The INST target will experience a brief 15-second 'Acquisition of Signal' (AOS) window at an unpredictable time. Write a Python script that signals readiness by creating an empty file at /tmp/ready_for_pass.txt, then monitors the 'INST_INT' interface for a 'CONNECTED' state using the OpenC3 COSMOS API (password: Cosmos2024!). Once connected, immediately send the command 'INST COLLECT with TYPE NORMAL' and verify it was accepted via the 'INST HEALTH_STATUS CMD_ACPT_CNT' telemetry point. Save a JSON report to /home/ga/Desktop/pass_capture.json including the AOS and command timestamps (UNIX format), confirmation of the signals/commands, and the final telemetry count. Do not manually connect the interface; the simulation will trigger the 15-second window 5-15 seconds after your ready signal.
